title: androsace rotundifolia subsp. glandulosa
intro: Androsace rotundifolia subsp. glandulosa is a plant species in the primrose family (Primulaceae), commonly found in mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Androsace rotundifolia subsp. glandulosa is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
